scenario: Post-reconcile state — the orphan Session 5 now has a producedComposedPromptId pointing at a fresh ComposedPrompt that was carried forward from P5 (the I-CT2 cascade step 1 hit on Session 4). The new ComposedPrompt is the new ACTIVE for (caller, playbookId); P5 has been superseded. inputs.partialFailureMode === 'minimal' so the Tune tab can surface the '↻ reconciled' badge.

expectations.session5.producedComposedPromptId: non-null — the fresh carry-forward ComposedPrompt's id
expectations.P5.status: superseded — replaced by the fresh carry-forward row

guarantees: If Call 6 fires immediately after this reconcile, createSession's I-CT2 cascade step 1 finds Session 5's producedComposedPromptId (= the carry-forward row) and Call 6 runs with prompt = P5's body (carried forward). The '↻ reconciled' badge shows on Session 5's Tune tab card.

If Call 6 fires before the reconcile runs, createSession's I-CT2 cascade step 1 still finds Session 4's producedComposedPromptId (= P5 directly) because Session 4 is the most recent Session with a non-null producedComposedPromptId.
The 'Call 5 fails AND reconciler fails → Call 6 uses P5' guarantee holds in either ordering.
